Position Summary:

The Facilities Coordinator is responsible for ensuring the smooth operation, maintenance, and safety of the organization’s physical workspace. This role involves coordinating repairs, managing vendors, overseeing office services, and supporting workplace initiatives to create a productive and compliant environment for employees.

Key Responsibilities Facilities Management:

  • Monitor and maintain office facilities, equipment, and common areas to ensure cleanliness and functionality.
  • Coordinate preventive maintenance and repairs with internal teams and external vendors.

Vendor & Service Coordination:

  • Manage relationships with service providers (cleaning, security, utilities, etc.).

Position Overview

The Company Nurse provides on‑site clinical care, health counseling, and occupational health services to employees in a high‑volume, 24/7 BPO environment. The role ensures prompt triage for medical concerns, coordinates external care and HMO benefits, supports DOLE/OSH compliance, and drives wellness programs to help improve attendance, productivity, and overall employee well‑being.

Key Responsibilities

  • Clinical Care & Triage Provide first aid, basic life support (BLS), and initial assessment for work‑related and non‑work‑related illnesses/injuries.
  • Determine fitness to work/return‑to‑work; escalate emergencies and arrange transport when needed.
  • Maintain an organized, well‑stocked clinic and ensure medical equipment ...

Position Overview

The Receptionist serves as the first point of contact for employees, applicants, clients, and visitors. This role is responsible for providing excellent customer service, managing front desk operations, and ensuring a smooth and professional experience for everyone entering the BPO office.

Key Responsibilities

  • Front Desk & Visitor Management Greet and assist visitors, applicants, and employees in a courteous and professional manner.
  • Manage the visitor logbook and issue visitor badges in accordance with company security protocols.
  • Inform concerned departments of visitor arrivals promptly. Telephone & Communication Handling Answer, screen, and direct phone calls to the appropriate personnel or department. Handle in...

Job Summary: We are pooling qualified Electrical Engineers for upcoming projects. The role involves designing, implementing, and supervising electrical systems in infrastructure and building projects.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Design and review electrical plans and specifications.
  • Supervise installation and testing of electrical systems.
  • Ensure compliance with safety and electrical codes.

Employment Type: Project-Based / Future Deployment
Reports To: Design Manager / Project Manager

Job Summary: We are building a pool of talented Architects for future projects. This role involves conceptualizing and developing architectural designs for various infrastructure and building projects.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Develop architectural plans and 3D models.
  • Coordinate with engineers and project teams.
  • Ensure compliance with building codes and design standards.

Location: Iloilo
Employment Type: Project-Based / Future Deployment
Reports To: Project Manager

Job Summary: We are pooling candidates for upcoming civil engineering roles. Ideal for professionals looking to be part of future infrastructure and construction projects.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Assist in the design, planning, and execution of civil works.
  • Prepare technical drawings, reports, and documentation.
  • Conduct site inspections and ensure compliance with plans.

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering.
  • Licensed Civil Engineer preferred.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

Job Summary: We are hiring an Infrastructure Engineer/Supervisor to oversee the technical execution of infrastructure works. This role is ideal for someone with hands-on experience in past projects and a strong understanding of civil infrastructure systems.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Supervise on-site infrastructure works including roads, drainage, and utilities.
  • Coordinate with contractors and ensure adherence to design specifications.
  • Conduct inspections and quality control checks.
  • Assist in resolving technical issues and site challenges.
